testcase.name: test_auth_required_returns_401
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_segment_api_phase3.py:43: in test_auth_required_returns_401 assert r.status_code == 401 E assert 502 == 401 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cube_returns_six_planes
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_segment_api_phase3.py:48: in test_cube_returns_six_planes assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_segment_api_phase3.py:59: in test_sphere_returns_one_sphere assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
